top_signals.title: Help to Save Reform
top_signals.summary: HM Treasury is seeking views on how the Help to Save scheme can be reformed and simplified.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.summary: The government is consulting on the tax relief available for the costs of remediating contaminated or long-term derelict land.

top_signals.title: Strategy: The Capital Stack Meets a Falling Bitcoin Price
top_signals.summary: Below is a summarized version of The Block Research’s Strategy: The Capital Stack Meets a Falling Bitcoin Price report. The full PDF version of this report is accessible here. Strategy Inc., formerly MicroStrategy, faces the first real test of its Bitcoin-treasury model. It holds 847,363 BTC acquired for $64.10 billion, or an average of $75,651. […]
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: SpaceX stock continues to slide following $400 billion sell-off
top_signals.summary: Gains have been pared back at the space and AI company following an initial surge after its record-breaking IPO.

top_signals.title: Extending online marketplace liability to combat non-compliance
top_signals.summary: A proposal to extend current online marketplace VAT liability rules to sales on OMPs by UK based businesses, when their goods are in the UK at the point of sale.

top_signals.title: Customs Modernisation
top_signals.summary: We welcome views on the future of international trade and the impacts of digitalised and modernised practices on the UK customs regime.

top_signals.title: VAT treatment of land for social housing
top_signals.summary: Consultation on introducing a new VAT zero rate for land intended for the construction of social housing across the UK.
